title: Professional Profile | Manav Gangwani, Bangalore - Facing Query
excerpt: Hello myself Manav Gangwani, working in MNC in Bangalore. Right now overseeing the implementation of a project management system using Monday.com for a large-scale enterprise with diverse teams and complex workflows. The…

posts.author: manavgangwani (manav gangwani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello myself Manav Gangwani, working in MNC in Bangalore. Right now overseeing the implementation of a project management system using Monday.com for a large-scale enterprise with diverse teams and complex workflows. The organization has strict security and compliance requirements.
Discuss how I can handle user permissions, data segmentation, and integration with other tools while ensuring a seamless user experience?
Outline a comprehensive strategy for configuring and customizing Monday.com to meet the specific needs of this enterprise.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Manav,

I understand you’re interested in our security and compliance regulations, and I’d be happy to share our trust center that outlines all the specifics in detail.

  • Trust Center | monday.com

You can use this information to compare against the specific needs of your company

Regarding user permissions, I’d be happy to share some documentation that you might find relevant:

  • Permissions on monday.com

I hope this helps!
